chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Bail Application No.S-392 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on M.A No.2606/2026 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection (s) 3. For orders on M.A No.2607/2026 (Exemption) 4. For hearing of main case 01.04.2026 Mr.Abdul Salam Chandio, Advocate for applicants ******* 1. Urgency granted. 2. Objection(s) Overruled. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. Applicants Naimatullah son of Azizullah, Sohail Ahmed son of Abul Khair and Ghulam Rasool son of Muhammad Bachal Panhwar seek protective bail in FIR No.207 of 2025 registered at P.S B-Section District Dadu for offences under Sections 324, 504, 337-F (vi), 506/2, 114 and 34 PPC. Learned Counsel contends that this is a false case registered against the applicants due to malafide intentions; that the applicants being law abiding citizen wish to face trial; however, they apprehend that before reaching trial Court they might be arrested, humiliated and disgraced; therefore seeks legal protection. Without dilating upon the merits of the case, the applicants are admitted to protective bail till 06.04.2026, subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.20,000/- (Rupees Twenty Thousand) each and P.R bonds in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on 06.04.2026 or when the applicants surrender themselves before the trial Court, whichever is earlier. The bail Application stands disposed of in above terms. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
